case_title: MERRILL LYNCH,PIERCE,FENDER & SMITH,INC. et al VS. GARY BIZZELL et al

docket_entries.description: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD & ENTER JUDGMENT; REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER MERRILL LYNCH,PIERCE,FENDER & SMITH,INC. ANAGNOSTOU, ANDREW HEARING SET FOR AUG-23-2004 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-23-2004 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER MERRILL LYNCH, PIERCE, FENDER & SMITH, INC., ANDREW ANAGNOSTOU PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD & ENTER JUDGMENT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - GRANT, NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. HON. PAUL H. ALVARADO. REPORTER: ROBERT BALIAN, CSR #5220

DECLARATION OF USULA M. HUSBY IN SUPPORT OF PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND ENTER JUDGMENT THEREON; PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PETITIONER MERRILL LYNCH,PIERCE,FENDER & SMITH,INC. ANAGNOSTOU, ANDREW

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: THE CLAIMS OF GARY BIZZELL AND ANNIE JACOB ARE DISMISSED IN ALL RESPECTS; AND ALL REFERENCE TO THIS MATTER IS TO BE EXPUNGED FROM THE NASD CENTRAL REGISTRATION DEPOSITORY RECORD OF ANDREW ANAGNOSTOU. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
